title: Tips & Shortcut (Windows)
description: Keyboard shortcut, tips produktivitas, dan trik berguna di CMD dan PowerShell.

commands.name: cmd-shortcuts
commands.title: CMD Keyboard Shortcuts
commands.description: Shortcut keyboard yang berguna di Command Prompt.
commands.examples:
# Autocomplete
cd Doc[Tab]       # → cd Documents

# History
↑↑↑              # Navigasi ke perintah sebelumnya
F7               # Dialog popup history

# Copy-paste di CMD modern
Ctrl+C           # Copy text yang diseleksi
Ctrl+V           # Paste

# Multiple perintah
perintah1 && perintah2   # Jalankan kedua jika pertama sukses
perintah1 || perintah2   # Jalankan kedua jika pertama gagal
perintah1 & perintah2    # Jalankan keduanya

commands.name: ps-shortcuts
commands.title: PowerShell Keyboard Shortcuts
commands.description: Shortcut keyboard dan fitur produktivitas PowerShell.
commands.examples:
# Tab completion canggih
Get-[Tab]         # Cycle semua cmdlet Get-*
Get-Proc[Tab]     # → Get-Process
-Name [Tab]       # Autocomplete parameter

# Reverse search
Ctrl+R            # Ketik untuk cari history

# Alias berguna
ls = Get-ChildItem
cd = Set-Location
cp = Copy-Item
mv = Move-Item
rm = Remove-Item
cat = Get-Content
clear = Clear-Host

# Cek alias
Get-Alias ls
Get-Alias | Where-Object {$_.Definition -like '*Process*'}

commands.name: win-shortcuts
commands.title: Windows System Shortcuts
commands.description: Shortcut keyboard Windows untuk akses cepat ke fitur sistem.
commands.examples:
# Run dialog shortcuts
Win+R → cmd         # Buka CMD
Win+R → powershell  # Buka PowerShell
Win+R → calc        # Kalkulator
Win+R → notepad     # Notepad
Win+R → mstsc       # Remote Desktop
Win+R → control     # Control Panel
Win+R → devmgmt.msc # Device Manager
Win+R → diskmgmt.msc # Disk Management
Win+R → services.msc # Services
Win+R → regedit     # Registry Editor
Win+R → msconfig    # System Configuration
Win+R → cleanmgr    # Disk Cleanup

commands.name: cmd-tips
commands.title: Tips & Trik CMD/PowerShell
commands.description: Tips dan trik berguna untuk bekerja lebih efisien di command line Windows.
commands.examples:
# Buka CMD/PS sebagai admin
Win+X → A    # Terminal Admin

# Rekam sesi PowerShell
Start-Transcript -Path C:\session.txt
# ... kerja ...
Stop-Transcript

# Cek versi PowerShell
$PSVersionTable.PSVersion

# Cari perintah
Get-Command *network*
Get-Command -Verb Get -Noun *IP*

# Bantuan lengkap
Get-Help Get-Process -Full
Get-Help Get-Process -Examples

# Execution policy (untuk script)
Get-ExecutionPolicy
Set-ExecutionPolicy RemoteSigned -Scope CurrentUser

# Profile PowerShell (auto-load)
notepad $PROFILE
# Tambahkan alias & fungsi yang sering dipakai

# Measure execution time
Measure-Command { Get-ChildItem -Recurse }

# History
Get-History
Invoke-History 5  # Jalankan ulang perintah #5
